title: Luffy Is Trapped Inside Nola
description: Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.
scene: Across pages 2, 3, 4, 5, this scene centers on Luffy, Enel, Eneru, Narrator, Nola. Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: Please don't say it like that, God-sama.

dialogue.speaker: Nola
dialogue.text: To return to their Homeland, yet...

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: is because 400 years ago our ancestors

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aren't we responsible... for continuing their fight?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Our country's treasure must be protected!

dialogue.speaker: Enel
dialogue.text: It is too hard to admit defeat

dialogue.speaker: Aisa
dialogue.text: We've fought about this for too long...

dialogue.speaker: Gan Fall
dialogue.text: ... hey, didn't there used to be

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My father is part of the militia...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Skypiea will fall into the blue seas!!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: This country... Will vanish into thin air!!

summary: Enel uses his power to dominate the survivors, showing that ordinary resistance cannot stop a god made of lightning.
